original_statement: how many men repatriated with rasul kudayev?
mutated_statement: how many men repatriated with a particular person while also ensuring those men did not repatriate with that same person?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Added contradictory condition (negation)] + [Scope/intent expansion]: Proper name replaced by vague referent (rasul kudayev → a particular person) | New clause introduces requirement that the men both repatriated with and did not repatriate with that person (logical contradiction) (how many men repatriated with rasul kudayev? → how many men repatriated with a particular person while also ensuring those men did not repatriate with that same person?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述可识别关键信息：agent仅引用“reported to have been repatriated on 24 February 2004 with six other Russian men”并据此断定答案为6，且没有任何地方提到对变异问题中“同时不与该人一同遣返”的否定条件或矛盾性的识别。具体表现为：直接忽略了新增的自相矛盾子句与实体泛化，按原始可解问题执行查询并返回确定性结果（6），也未尝试澄清或修正。因为agent既未指出矛盾，也未请求澄清或通过逻辑/流程修正，因此符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”的分类。
